---
number-sections: false
---

# Practice 11: Text and Human Language {#ch-practice-11 .unnumbered}

**Theory connection:** [Volume I, Chapter 11](../chapters/11-text-language.qmd)

Use this chapter as the practical companion to the corresponding theory chapter.
Recovered activities are linked where a strong match exists; other sections are
explicit development scaffolds for the next writing cycle.

## Text Vectorization {#sec-pr-11-text-vectorization}

Recovered starting point: [Text Vectorization](labs/text-vectorization.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization) and [Text Vectorization Programming Assignment](labs/text-vectorization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Tokenization {#sec-pr-11-tokenization}

Recovered starting point: [Text Vectorization](labs/text-vectorization.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization) and [Text Vectorization Programming Assignment](labs/text-vectorization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Term Weighting {#sec-pr-11-term-weighting}

Recovered starting point: [Text Vectorization](labs/text-vectorization.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization) and [Text Vectorization Programming Assignment](labs/text-vectorization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Similarity Measures {#sec-pr-11-similarity-measures}

Recovered starting point: [Data, Vectors, and Cosine Assignment](labs/data-initialization-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-data-initialization-assignment) and [Text Vectorization](labs/text-vectorization.qmd#sec-lab-text-vectorization).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Probabilities and Implications {#sec-pr-11-probabilities-and-implications}

::: {.callout-note title="Practice development scaffold"}
Create an activity that makes **Probabilities and Implications** observable through a calculation,
small implementation, visualization, diagnostic, or written interpretation.
Include a reproducible input, a checkable result, and one reflection question.
::: 

### Zipf's Law {#sec-pr-11-zipf-s-law}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Feature Selection {#sec-pr-11-feature-selection}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

## Text Classification {#sec-pr-11-text-classification}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Naive Bayes with Binary Term Occurrences (Bernoulli) {#sec-pr-11-naive-bayes-with-binary-term-occurrences-bernoulli}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.

### Naive Bayes with Term Frequencies (Multinomial) {#sec-pr-11-naive-bayes-with-term-frequencies-multinomial}

Recovered starting point: [Integrated Data Learning Assignment](labs/integrated-learning-assignment.qmd#sec-lab-integrated-learning-assignment).

Use the recovered material as evidence and raw material; revise package calls,
expected outputs, and assessment criteria before assigning it in a current course.
